stations.name: Closest station is via the South-East Busway interchange

buses.note: Bus routes serve Mount Gravatt East via Logan Road and the South-East Busway corridor.

driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 16 to 20 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Westfield Garden City is within a short drive. Local retail along Logan Road.

pockets.name: Family streets
pockets.character: Established family-home stock with catchment access.

pockets.name: Mount Gravatt Outlook side
pockets.character: Streets bordering the reserve and the lookout.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers seeking larger blocks at a more accessible price.
